use_cases: Entering currency amounts with selectable denomination like USD, EUR, or INR
Accepting numeric values with built-in increment/decrement stepper controls
Collecting form data with combined text input and dropdown selection
Inputting quantities or amounts in e-commerce checkout flows
Handling financial or pricing data in SaaS billing interfaces
ai_summary: A compound input component combining a text input field with a select dropdown and increment/decrement stepper buttons. Designed specifically for currency and amount entry, featuring a currency selector (USD/EUR/INR), numeric value input with step controls, and smooth focus transitions. Uses Tailwind styling with a clean, functional aesthetic suitable for fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS applications requiring amount or quantity inputs.
